name: Whole Wheat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour 18 muffin cups.
3. Sift together the whole wheat flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the light brown sugar, chopped walnuts, and raisins.
5. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and melted vegetable shortening until well blended.
6. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
7. Fill each muffin cup about three-quarters full with batter.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
